title: Forge Optimized
description: The best Forge optimization modpack for 1.21.8 | FPS 200+ For comfortable play with friends or on servers without lags
body:

rendering overhauls, and Entity Culling to skip unnecessary renders—perfect **_for lag-free sessions on public servers or cozy co-op with buddies_**, **_even during massive builds or mob farms!_**
